summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 8 warning, 12 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: ЁЯЯб bin/lib/extensions.mjs:124 тАФ Pre-existing: `Promise.race` timeout pattern has no `.catch()` on the losing promise; may emit unhandled rejection warnings in Node.js. Carried from task-15 тАФ belongs on backlog.
ЁЯЯб STATE.json:127 тАФ task-16 shows `"status": "blocked"` while handshake says `"completed"` тАФ state tracking needs reconciliation

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/extensions.mjs:124` тАФ Extensions receive `ctx` by reference; a buggy extension could mutate shared fields and break subsequent extensions in the same `callHook` loop. Add `Object.freeze(ctx)` or shallow-copy, plus a test for context mutation.

The round-1 ЁЯЯб about missing command attribution logging is now **resolved** тАФ `console.log(\`[ext] ${ext.name}: running "${desc.command}"\`)` is present at line 236 with test coverage at lines 2150-2196.

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/extensions.mjs:246` тАФ `spawnSync` error not checked. When spawn itself fails (bad cwd, ENOENT), `spawned.status` is `null` тЖТ `?? 0` тЖТ exit code 0. A `required: true` command that fails to spawn silently "passes". Fix: check `spawned.error` before evaluating status.
ЁЯЯб bin/lib/run.mjs:786 тАФ `_runSingleFeature` is ~860 lines. Pre-existing; task-16 adds ~30 well-placed hook calls but isn't the cause.
ЁЯЯб bin/lib/extensions.mjs:216 тАФ Timeout+circuit-breaker pattern duplicated between `callHook` and `runExecuteRun`. Justified for 2 sites; extract if a 3rd appears.
**No ЁЯФ┤ critical findings. No merge blockers.**

The prior simplicity review's ЁЯЯб about `runParallelReviews` positional params was **fixed** in commit `f88a219` тАФ now uses a destructured options object. Evaluation written to `eval-simplicity.md`.
